name: blocks-idp
description: Authentication, user management, MFA, RBAC, SSO/OIDC, session handling, and organization operations for SELISE Blocks IDP API

changes: Full standardization aligned to IDP v1 Swagger spec
All responses now use isSuccess (not success) envelope
All response schemas updated to {data, errors, totalCount} pattern
25 new action files added (OIDC, SSO, client credentials, timeline, signup settings)
frontend-react.md consolidated into references/nextjs-app-router.md and references/react-vite.md
